metadata.description: Built-in Claude Code skills for working with Mooncake: deployment troubleshooting, local CI validation, and the Python API.

plugins.name: mooncake-troubleshoot
plugins.description: Systematically diagnose Mooncake deployment and runtime issues (services, RDMA, env vars, connectivity, logs) and propose fixes.

plugins.name: mooncake-ci-local
plugins.description: Run Mooncake pre-PR local validation via scripts/run_ci_test.sh, reproducing the reproducible parts of GitHub Actions.

plugins.name: mooncake-api
plugins.description: Work with the Mooncake Store, Transfer Engine, and EP/Backend Python APIs.
